articles.author: Anthony Faiola, Rael Ombuor, Rachel Chason
articles.title: On Africa trip, Pope Leo will face debate over polygamy as Catholicism booms - The Washington Post
articles.description: Leo’s early papacy has been defined largely by his response to President Donald Trump but a 10-day trip, starting Monday, will let the pope focus on spreading the faith.
articles.content: VATICAN CITY This week, Pope Leo XIV will walk in the footsteps of his icon, Saint Augustine of Hippo, a towering theologian whose birth in what is now Algeria makes him historys most revered African… [+239 chars]
